findings.summary: IC power pin U1.67 (BST1_0) has no DC path to a power rail (net 'BST1_0')
findings.description: Pin U1.67 (BST1_0) is type=power_in on net 'BST1_0'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
findings.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.

findings.description: Pin *XRES on U1 (WLC1115-68LQXQ) is connected to net XRES but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from XRES to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin *XRES is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

Net BST1_0 carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

findings.description: Sourcing audit: 5 of 48 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (10.4%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

findings.summary: Lifecycle audit not run — --lifecycle flag not passed
findings.description: Component lifecycle / obsolescence audit was not run this session. Reason: --lifecycle flag not passed (run with --lifecycle to query DigiKey / Mouser / LCSC / element14 for obsolescence + operating-temp coverage; requires network + API keys). The review cannot report active / NRND / EOL / obsolete status, last-time-buy windows, or operating-temperature coverage for any BOM part. Treat the lifecycle section of the report as 'not performed'.
findings.recommendation: Run with --lifecycle (requires DIGIKEY_CLIENT_ID / MOUSER_SEARCH_API_KEY / ELEMENT14_API_KEY env vars; LCSC needs no auth) to populate this section. If intentionally skipped, note it explicitly in the report's 'Not Performed' section.

report_context.impact: No obsolescence / temperature-grade evidence available.

top_issues.summary: IC power pin U1.67 (BST1_0) has no DC path to a power rail (net 'BST1_0')
top_issues.description: Pin U1.67 (BST1_0) is type=power_in on net 'BST1_0'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
top_issues.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.

top_issues.summary: IC power pin U1.14 (VBRG_DIS) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_10')

top_issues.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (5/48 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found (8/122 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
top_issues.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.
Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from XRES to the appropriate power rail.
